Description: Entry-level engineer role focused on building tools, improving pipelines, and working with low-level game engine systems to support developers across the team. Involves debugging, optimizing performance, and contributing to engine stability.

Designs and builds advanced AI systems for team-based sports gameplay, including decision-making, positioning, and realistic player behavior in Unreal Engine 5. Also collaborates across teams and mentors engineers while optimizing performance-critical systems.

Leads a team building presentation systems such as cameras, cinematics, crowds, and broadcast-style features in Unreal Engine 5. Combines hands-on engineering with leadership, collaborating across disciplines to deliver a polished player experience.

This role is a high-level engineering position focused on building and leading the online multiplayer systems for a AAA sports game. You would design backend services, manage real-time multiplayer infrastructure, and work heavily with cloud systems and Unreal Engine 5.

This Producer role at 2K Sports Lab focuses on coordinating teams and managing the game development process to ensure features are completed on time, within scope, and at high quality. You work closely with designers, engineers, and artists using tools like Jira to organize workflows, solve problems, and keep the project running smoothly.

This role focuses on creating high-quality 3D environments like landscapes and buildings using tools such as Unreal Engine 5, while balancing visual quality and performance. You also collaborate with teams and mentor junior artists to ensure environments support gameplay and storytelling.

This role focuses on designing and leading the development of core gameplay systems, especially creating realistic sports mechanics, while working closely with engineers, animators, and production teams. You guide a team, shape the gameplay vision, and ensure the player experience is polished and engaging.

This role focuses on building and optimizing real-time multiplayer systems using Unreal Engine 5 and custom servers, solving networking challenges like latency and synchronization while collaborating with cross-functional teams. You also write high-quality code and help mentor other engineers to ensure strong technical standards.

This role focuses on building and refining character movement and player control systems using Unreal Engine 5, ensuring gameplay feels responsive, realistic, and optimized for multiplayer experiences. You collaborate with designers and animators while developing networked gameplay systems and mentoring other engineers.

This role focuses on designing and building immersive game worlds and levels using Unreal Engine, including creating layouts, gameplay spaces, and player experiences. You lead a team and collaborate with artists and engineers to ensure the world is engaging, functional, and aligned with the game’s vision.

This role focuses on building and improving narrative and cinematic systems in Unreal Engine 5, including tools for storytelling, cameras, dialogue, and in-game cutscenes. You work with designers and animators to create smooth, high-quality story moments while optimizing performance and developing engine-level features using C++.

This role focuses on building and maintaining scalable online multiplayer backend systems and client-side features in Unreal Engine 5 using languages like C++, Go, and Python. You also work with cloud infrastructure, databases, and distributed systems to ensure smooth, reliable online gameplay experiences.

This role focuses on designing and shaping core gameplay systems for a sports game, acting as a “product owner” for major features and ensuring they deliver engaging, player-driven experiences in Unreal Engine 5. You collaborate with engineers, artists, and producers to define vision, refine features, and improve overall gameplay quality.

This role focuses on bridging art and engineering by building tools, shaders, and workflows in Unreal Engine 5 to improve visual quality and performance. You collaborate with artists and engineers to solve technical art problems and create efficient pipelines using tools like Python, Blueprint, and 3D software.
You will have opportunities to script gameplay systems and environmental systems to support core gameplay, combat,  puzzles, and missions.

As a Advanced Technical Animator at Certain Affinity, you'll get the chance to see some of the custom 3D tools and pipelines behind the world's biggest shooters and contribute to our proprietary technology.
You will have opportunities to script gameplay and related systems, with a focus on core gameplay, enemy behaviors, interactions, combat and encounters.
This role requires an energetic individual to take a hands-on approach to our pipeline management and look development for our studio art team.

This is a great opportunity to assist in the project's design by providing pre-visualization animations for gameplay elements and evolving and refining motion for characters, weapons, vehicles, and environmental objects.
Program core engine systems for a new AAA title. 1-3 years C++ experience required.
Build high-quality character rigs in Maya for AAA animation pipelines in Unreal Engine.
Design and maintain real-time VFX systems using Unreal Engine and Niagara for a multiplayer title.
Create characters and creatures using Maya, ZBrush, and Substance for the For Honor franchise.
Drive gameplay systems for a large-scale multiplayer sci-fi game. 7+ years C++ and UE5 required.
Define and lead the audio vision for a new game project. Strong Unreal Engine and leadership experience needed.
Develop and optimize 3D rendering systems in Unreal Engine. 5+ years C++ and DirectX experience.

Porting the game Citadel from existing console code to PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X. Responsibilities include optimizing multiplayer systems, ensuring performance and graphics parity with PC, handling console certification requirements, debugging issues, collaborating with QA/design, and developing gameplay systems using C++ and Unreal Engine 4 (Blueprints). Also involves working with Epic Online Services and console APIs.

Developing multiplayer gameplay systems using Unreal Engine 5. The role involves collaborating closely with designers, UI, and VFX/SFX teams to build engaging gameplay experiences, implement new content, and improve workflows. Responsibilities include optimizing performance, working with client/server architecture, and extending existing codebases using C++ and Blueprints.

Red Diamond is seeking interns to work as writers on an upcoming dark fantasy mobile game and tabletop RPG. In this role, you will contribute to lore, world-building, creatures, characters, and other elements within an established but expanding universe. You may also have opportunities to work on additional writing tasks, including non-fiction articles that review popular games. This position is full-time and temporary, lasting three months, and is intended for current or graduating college students.

Red Diamond is seeking a Social Media Manager to execute a social media strategy for its upcoming dark fantasy mobile game. In this role, you will be responsible for creating and managing engaging social media content tailored to gaming audiences. You will also assist in producing content for an affiliated print and book publishing team. This is a full-time position intended for recent graduates and early career professionals, focusing on marketing, content creation, and audience engagement.
Are you ready to immerse yourself in a world where creativity is the key to success? We are dedicated to crafting extraordinary experiences for gamers worldwide.
We are seeking a versatile and proactive HR Generalist to join our team.
We are seeking a highly skilled Lead Data Engineer to join our team.

We’re looking for a Video Creator to create award winning videos that promote Warframe and achieve our marketing objectives. Do you have a cinematic eye for building a scene and capturing gameplay footage?
